parsed.summary: Graph is well-formed and executable: valid JSON; acyclic; sinks match the objective and have no outgoing edges; all edge endpoints exist; correct use of crafting, smelting, workstation, and tool dependencies; smelting includes input, fuel, and furnace; quantities are consistent (inputs cover consumed outputs) with only batch-forced overproduction. No material defects found.
